name: rty-skill-authoring
description: Creates, reviews, and refines agent skills following the agentskills.io specification and Riverty conventions

interface.shortDescription: Create and refine agent skills following the agentskills.io spec and Riverty conventions.
interface.longDescription: Guides authors through the full skill lifecycle: scope definition, SKILL.md structure, progressive disclosure across references and assets, script bundling, and quality validation. Enforces Riverty naming conventions and hub contribution requirements.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me create an agent skill following Riverty conventions.
